title: About
content: Morning Reflections with Rebecca is a faith and community blog companion to the Saturday radio program on WGSP 1490 AM, Memphis. Rebecca Price is a Board Certified Hospital Chaplain at Bluff City Medical Center and a Memphis native. She writes about faith, healing, chaplaincy, and the everyday work of hope. New posts most weeks.

title: Contact
content: To reach Rebecca for speaking inquiries, guest bookings, or listener correspondence, email rebecca.price@memorialhospital-mem.org. For WGSP 1490 AM show inquiries, contact station manager TJ Jackson directly at the station.

title: Privacy Policy
content: This blog collects comment author names and emails for moderation purposes only. They are never shared, sold, or used for marketing. Blog analytics are minimal. No patient information or confidential pastoral care data is ever published here.

title: About the Show
content: Morning Reflections with Rebecca has aired live on WGSP 1490 AM every Saturday from 7:00 to 9:00 AM since 2019. The show covers faith, community, music, and practical hope for the Mid-South. Sponsors include Covenant Insurance Group, Mitchell's Flowers, and Bluff City Auto Care. You can tune in at 1490 AM or stream online through the WGSP website.
